extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT and LAPORTE rode away as a Jumbo-Visma duo after BENOOT destroyed the Paterberg, finishing 1-2 with 36km remaining.
tactical_patterns: BENOOT sacrificing on Paterberg with three Jumbo riders front enabled clean 2-up breakaway with 36km remaining.
JUNGELS, BISSEGGER, VAN AERT attacking Taaienberg with 80km out created selection before traditional finale climbs.
Ineos Grenadiers chase brought gap down enough for MILAN to bridge, but no organizational payoff materialized.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: solo stomped 20% Paterberg gradient with only teammate for company, controlling race from 36km out
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: matched VAN AERT on Paterberg and cooperated fully to finish line, rare 1-2 team result
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: elite domestique performance setting tempo on Paterberg, buried himself with three teammates positioned ahead
rider_signals.GIRMAY Biniam: positive: hung with select group post-Paterberg for fifth place at age 21 in debut cobbled classic
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: attacked disorganized chase group late to take solo third, only rider with confidence to move
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: neutral: bridged successfully from Ineos chase to front group on Taaienberg but provided no tactical leverage
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: negative: defending champion unable to follow VAN AERT acceleration on Paterberg despite early front group position
rider_signals.VAN BAARLE Dylan: negative: resigned to chasing group sprint despite quality, suggesting form below Jumbo trio standard
rider_signals.MOHORIC Matej: neutral: two teammates in early move but no Bahrain payoff when race exploded on Paterberg
